metadata.title: Interactivity: Calculations and Scripts
metadata.description: Interactivity: Calculations and Scripts Localization & Tweaks

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Prepend the output with custom text
ast.target: 在输出前添加自定义文本

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Define text shortcuts for running commands. The text before '->' is the shortcut; the text after is the command to execute. Use ##param## to include the line after the shortcut in the command. Press Shift+Enter for a new line without triggering the shortcut.
ast.target: 定义用于运行命令的文本快捷方式。'->' 之前的文本是快捷方式；之后的文本是要执行的命令。使用 ##param## 将快捷方式后的行包含在命令中。按 Shift+Enter 可换行而不触发快捷方式。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Use external executables instead of JavaScript (unsafe!)
ast.target: 使用外部可执行文件代替 JavaScript（不安全！）

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Specify the path to the shell executable. Use ##plugin## to refer to the plugin's directory.
ast.target: 指定 shell 可执行文件的路径。使用 ##plugin## 引用插件目录。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Set environment variables. Use ##plugin## to refer to the plugin's directory.
ast.target: 设置环境变量。使用 ##plugin## 引用插件目录。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Specify shell command-line arguments. Use ##plugin## to refer to the plugin's directory
ast.target: 指定 shell 命令行参数。使用 ##plugin## 引用插件目录。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.target: 关闭 Obsidian 时不可执行

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: e.g., number of lines in shell greetings
ast.target: 例如，shell 问候语中的行数

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Use notifications instead of appending the output to the Obsidian notes
ast.target: 使用通知代替将输出附加到 Obsidian 笔记中

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Decorate each line of the output

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Text shortcuts that run commands, one per line
ast.target: 运行命令的文本快捷方式，每行一个

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Shell CLI arguments, one per line
ast.target: Shell CLI 参数，每行一个

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Commands to run after starting the shell
ast.target: 启动 shell 后运行的命令

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Commands to run before closing the shell
ast.target: 关闭 shell 前运行的命令

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Enable separate shell sessions for each note
ast.target: 为每个笔记启用独立的 shell 会话

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Apply a RegExp pattern to filter the output
ast.target: 应用正则表达式模式以过滤输出

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Specify the number of initial lines to suppress
ast.target: 指定要抑制的初始行数
